name: Coffee Price Search
description: Search nearby chain coffee delivery and pickup prices, then return a WeChat-ready ranking.

configPath.description: Local coffee price config path. Defaults to config/coffee-price.config.json.

luckinTokenPath.description: Local path for the user's Luckin MCP token. Defaults to the user profile token file.

mcdTokenPath.description: Local path for the user's McDonald's MCP token. Defaults to the user profile token file.

genericMcpTokenDir.description: Local directory for user-provided generic MCP price source bearer tokens.

brandOfficial.description: Optional brand official snapshot JSON path.
